input.question: What is the average GPA of students by scholarship type received?

payload.question: What is the average GPA of students by scholarship type received?

output.sql:
SELECT
  s.scholarship_type AS scholarship_type,
  AVG(st.gpa) AS avg_gpa,
  COUNT(DISTINCT st.student_id) AS student_count
FROM scholarships s
JOIN students st ON s.student_id = st.student_id
GROUP BY s.scholarship_type;

payload.sql:
SELECT
  s.scholarship_type AS scholarship_type,
  AVG(st.gpa) AS avg_gpa,
  COUNT(DISTINCT st.student_id) AS student_count
FROM scholarships s
JOIN students st ON s.student_id = st.student_id
GROUP BY s.scholarship_type;
